feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: >be me >new corporate job >welcome, meet everyone, vibe well >I can do this job.…
entry.content: >be me >new corporate job >welcome, meet everyone, vibe well >I can do this job. I'm good at it >Thursday night, "let's get drinks after work" >"Okay" >hanging out. Drinks. Fun. Six of us >play "would you rather", just keeping the fun going >my turn, "I've got a great one for the guys" >"would you rather be raped by your dad, or rape your mum?" >silence >everyone uncomfortable >I laugh it off, but doesn't work. Night ends. One of them was HR. How fucked am I?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Man falls into waist-deep water, refuses to stand and lets himself drown. Nothing to see here
entry.content: Every week there's a new news story in the UK like this. The British media, for some reason, really wants you to believe that people routinely fall into waist-deep, still water, refuse to stand up, and against self-preservation instincts, casually let themselves drown

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Was personal computing artifact of the Moore's law? >we'll be replacing our enti…
entry.content: Was personal computing artifact of the Moore's law? >we'll be replacing our entire compute every year anyway, so we may as well give it to plebeians... And now since tech has stagnated and everyone is fighting for the chips manufacturing capacity, naturally those at the top of the hierarchy hoard it all for themselves.

entry.title: /b/ Random: Padded and Destroyed
entry.content: Jake had always been a high-strung executive, but the moment he stepped through the door of their secluded countryside home, he became Mommy's property. Sarah—his stunning, raven-haired wife with full breasts, wide hips, and a sadistic maternal streak—had trained him perfectly over the past year. Tonight, she was going to push him deeper into depravity than ever before. "Strip, baby," Sarah commanded the second the door locked. Her voice was sweet honey laced with venom. Jake's cock twitched as

entry.title: /mu/ Music: /mu/ curates a 90 minute mix tape
entry.content: This tape has two sides, let’s refer to them as side A and side B. Each side has 45 minutes. Your task is to curate a playlist for each side. Please take your time and listen to the songs you don’t know. All suggestions are welcome. Please refrain from re rolling.

entry.title: /g/ Technology: My coworker started using Claude
entry.content: And it's a nightmare. I submit an issue and they "fix" it in 5 minutes. The next day I test the same thing and it doesn't even work or has 5 more bugs. Management is very happy with how productive they are. They can pump out dozens of commits a day. I can't do this anymore.

It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: The founder tried to paint ray kroc as the villain and the mcdonalds brothers as…
entry.content: The founder tried to paint ray kroc as the villain and the mcdonalds brothers as the heroes. Why? These fags literally did nothing but invent an efficient way of shitting burgers out. Ray had the vision and the drive to actually turn mcdonalds into an american institution.

entry.title: /int/ International: Say thank you to Indians
entry.content: >No, there is no major host country where Indian immigrants as a group are a notable economic liability or heavily reliant on welfare. Data consistently shows they tend to be net contributors, often more so than other immigrant groups or natives, due to high education levels, employment rates, and skilled migration patterns. >Grok

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Fisher Stevens Neck!
entry.content: hahaha, what the fuck? It's a case of huge head and wide jaw + stick neck. I don't remember him always looking so ridiculous. Maybe he just needs some meat on his bones. Maybe that's why he wore a turtleneck in Hackers though. Maybe it's always been a problem. Trying to remember Short Circuit now. Starting Season 10 of The Blacklist tonight. I wonder if they're resurrect him too eventually. Seems to happen with most dead characters to some degree.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: funny idea
entry.content: Remember back in 2014 when 4chan and tumblr had the great war and Yall know how normies kinda suck and only use tik tok and Instagram? Well I got a funny idea. What if we unite with tumblr and reddit to start another great war? It would be even grander than the first great war. We just invade tiktok and Instagram. Smarts vs normies. Just an idea for yall.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Just one more thing, anon. Earlier today you told me that your a very social per…
entry.content: Just one more thing, anon. Earlier today you told me that your a very social person yet your car's passenger seats look new, as if no one's ever sat in them and you just told me you don't have any plans for the 4th of July weekend. You do know it's the US 250th birthday right? Also everyone is gonna be out....yet you'll be at home. Just odd that s social person would miss something so big

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I just moved from Windows to Linux (more in concrete, Arch Linux) Trying to make…
entry.content: I just moved from Windows to Linux (more in concrete, Arch Linux) Trying to make the MT7902 work was a chaos. I moved from LMDE7 to Debian 13, to Arch Linux Goodbye Windows 11, hello Linux An advice for all those who want to get into Linux (like me): do NEVER EVER pick ubuntu (that's trash, almost like a "Windows for Linux")

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /hdgg/ - Human Domestication Guide General, 218th Bloom
entry.content: General for discussion of Human Domestication Guide & related fiction. Isn't this a lovely edition? >What is HDG? HDG is a collective kink writing project about the Affini (an advanced precursor civilization from outer space), who aggressively care for every other species in the universe. They have finally turned their glittery eyes on future grimderp hypercapitalist nightmare humanity. Using their natural charisma and various classes of Xenodrugs, they aim to make Florets (d̶o̶c̶i̶l̶e̶,̶ ̶d̶r̶u

entry.title: /g/ Technology: I dropped my moto g 2025 in the toilet the other day. I let it dry for 3 days an…
entry.content: I dropped my moto g 2025 in the toilet the other day. I let it dry for 3 days and turned it off like 5 minutes after it was submerged in the water but now I'm constantly worried that it's overheating without me knowing and thus I may be inhaling odorless toxic fumes without me realizing it, or somehow have have increased risk of lead exposure. I'm currently using it right now to type this, I may have undiagnosed OCD but I just don't want to be exposed to neurotoxic fumes and elements and end up

entry.title: /b/ Random: I had sex with my cousin a few years ago on a family vacation for a wedding, I w…
entry.content: I had sex with my cousin a few years ago on a family vacation for a wedding, I would describe it as the most awkward and hottest experience of my life. I was 33 and she was 24, she's cute and I'd perv over her a bit but until it happened I would have never believed it. She went swimming in her underwear and I got aroused, the whole family was there so I was trying not to stare but when she got out of the water in her underwear dripping wet with her nipples almost visible I couldn't keep my eyes
